title: Samsung Electronics posts record quarterly profit on AI boom
description: Samsung Electronics said Thursday that operating profit soared 750 percent on-year to a record high in the first quarter thanks to strong sales of chips crucial for artificial intelligence, and forecast continued healthy demand in the next three months. title: Ottawa will wait for OpenAI info on Tumbler Ridge before regulating: Solomon
description: OTTAWA — The federal government will weigh information provided by OpenAI on the Tumbler Ridge, B.C. shooting before taking action, Artificial Intelligence Minister Evan Solomon said Thursday.
content:

title: Trump to Newsmax: AI Will Lead to 'Tremendous Numbers of Jobs'
description: In an exclusive interview on Newsmax, President Donald Trump said artificial intelligence will fuel a surge in U.S. job creation, accelerate medical breakthroughs and help the United States outpace China, while the U.S. economy remains strong and expanding.

title: Canada hasn’t yet left the ‘locker room’ in AI race, experts warn
description: Canada risks being left behind in the artificial intelligence race if it doesn't step up fast on issues like privacy and data sovereignty, the former CEO of BlackBerry says.
content:
Canada risks being left behind in the artificial intelligence race if it doesn’t step up quickly on issues like privacy and data sovereignty, the former CEO of BlackBerry told members of Parliament in a series of blunt warnings Thursday.

title: Hosp uses AI to cut radiation in lung cancer screening
description: Chennai: Radiologists at a city hospital demonstrated that artificial intelligence can slash radiation exposure in lung cancer screening by up to 80% .
content: Chennai: Radiologists at a city hospital demonstrated that artificial intelligence can slash radiation exposure in lung cancer screening by up to 80% while preserving diagnostic accuracy needed to catch tumours early. The study of 179 patients at MGM... [1272 chars]

title: Judge warns lawyers that AI itself is not on trial
description: OAKLAND, California — The third day of Elon Musk’s testimony in his high-stakes trial against OpenAI began with a bout of bickering over whether AI could lead to the “extinction” of the human race.“This is a real risk, we all could die as a result of artificial intelligence,” Musk’s attorney Steven Molo said in the courtroom, in objection to Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers’ attempts to shut down the discussion
